description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. This shoe is also great for a fun run in the sun!Product DetailsRound toed grey shoes with mesh inlays for breathabilityHas a padded inner and tongueThick rubber outsole, upraised at the heelHas curvy lugs all over the outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
